summary: An assembly test failed because FileCheck did not find expected patterns in the generated assembly for the wasm_exceptions test.
root_cause: The FileCheck checks in /checkout/tests/assembly-llvm/wasm_exceptions.rs expected strings that were not present in the generated assembly file /checkout/obj/build/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/test/assembly-llvm/wasm_exceptions/wasm_exceptions.s, causing the test to fail.

evidence.quote: /checkout/tests/assembly-llvm/wasm_exceptions.rs:38:12: error: CHECK: expected string not found in input
evidence.reason: FileCheck reported that an expected CHECK pattern (line 38) was not found in the input.

evidence.quote: /checkout/tests/assembly-llvm/wasm_exceptions.rs:62:12: error: CHECK: expected string not found in input
evidence.reason: FileCheck reported another expected CHECK pattern (line 62) was not found.
Identifies the generated assembly file that was checked.
Identifies the test file containing the FileCheck patterns.
Shows the nearby assembly content in the input file where FileCheck scanned but did not find the expected pattern.
Confirms failure was due to FileCheck verification failing.

suggested_fix: Inspect the generated assembly at /checkout/obj/build/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/test/assembly-llvm/wasm_exceptions/wasm_exceptions.s, compare it with the CHECK patterns in /checkout/tests/assembly-llvm/wasm_exceptions.rs, and either (a) update the CHECK lines to match the current assembly output or (b) adjust the codegen so the assembly matches the test expectations. Re-run the assembly test (FileCheck) locally to verify the fix.
